channel.title: Posts on My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on My New Hugo Site

item.title: Poverty
item.description: Why do we have an inflection point at 2030? Maybe due to ’net zero'? Global net-zero emissions, or net-zero carbon, is widely targeted by 2050 to prevent the worst impacts of climate change by limiting global warming to 1.5°C. This involves balancing greenhouse gases produced with the amount removed from the atmosphere, often requiring a 45% reduction in emissions by 2030.

item.title: Sjøfjellatlas
item.description: Idé Lag et atlas av sjøfjell på norsk sokkel. Lag prominencepunkter, og kjør en for loop for hvret punkt som lager et fint utsnitt av området. Bruk e.g. -R<radius> for å lage region. Bakgrunn Etter disse to artiklene: https://www.abcnyheter.no/livsstil/kanarioyene-vulkan-under-havet-er-aktiv/1465844 https://www.canariajournalen.no/nyheter/2026/03/aktivitet-pavist-i-vulkan-pa-kanarioyene Søkte jeg på dette og fikk følgende resultater: https://www.google.com/search?q=sea+mount+mediano https://portals.iucn.org/library/sites/library/files/documents/2015-043-intro_chp.1.pdf https://www.google.com/search?q=Enmedio+sea+mount&sca_esv=246d97976218a45f&sxsrf=ANbL-n7dtIKcQ3Y2hwbnzm9oJqQSwozTjw%3A1773215939343&ei=wyCxafXRFLWpwPAPyd-x4Aw&biw=1798&bih=1157&ved=0ahUKEwi1v7KRsJeTAxW1FBAIHclvDMwQ4dUDCBE&uact=5&oq=Enmedio+sea+mount&gs_lp=Egxnd3Mtd2l6LXNlcnAiEUVubWVkaW8gc2VhIG1vdW50MgcQIRigARgKMgQQIRgVSL4XUHdYzhNwAXgAkAEAmAGOAaAByQeqAQM3LjO4AQPIAQD4AQGYAgugAuQHwgIJEAAYsAMYBxgewgIFEAAYgATCAgsQABiABBiRAhiKBcICBBAAGB7CAgYQABgWGB7CAggQABgTGBYYHsICBRAhGKABmAMAiAYBkAYKkgcDOC4zoAfYI7IHAzcuM7gH4QfCBwMyLjnIBw-ACAA&sclient=gws-wiz-serp https://www.icm.csic.es/en/news/csic-detects-hydrothermal-activity-first-time-submarine-volcano-located-between-tenerife-and https://www.hi.no/en/hi/nettrapporter/rapport-fra-havforskningen-en-2019-42 https://www.whoi.edu/ocean-learning-hub/ocean-topics/how-the-ocean-works/seafloor-below/seamounts/ https://oceanexplorer.noaa.gov/ocean-fact/seamounts/ https://oceanexplorer.noaa.gov/expedition-feature/okeanos-ex1905-background-canyons-seamounts/ https://www.researchgate.net/publication/295531643_1_Seamounts_and_Seamount-like_Structures_of_the_Alboran_Sea

item.title: Kaizen
item.description: Kaizensystemet Kaizen er et japansk konsept som sier at små og kontinuerlige endringer, gjennom alle lag av prosessen, akkumulerer seg opp til å gi store resultater. Vi skiller mellom Point kaizen og System kaizen Point: As soon as something is found broken or incorrect, quick and immediate measures are taken to correct the issues System: devised to address system-level problems Kaizen De positive aspektene, som man skal gjøre. De 5 S’ene Seiri: Create order: remove everything that is not necessary from your workspace!

item.title: Todo
item.description: Cheat sheet for publising new posts: $ cd blog $ hugo new content/posts/<postname>.md hugo supports asciidoc as well, so I might try that format as some point. Then the extension should be .adoc. See https://gohugo.io/content-management/formats/ for more.

item.title: Alacritty
item.description: Alacritty Just learned about alacritty(1). Might start using it.
